title: file — Read/Write/Edit/Grep/Glob Cheatsheet
desc: wkappbot file tools for filesystem access. edit auto-creates .bak/ backup. glob MUST use **/ prefix. After edit, U+FFFD corruption triggers auto Slack alert.
steps: READ: wkappbot file read <path> [--offset N] [--limit N]
GREP: wkappbot file grep "pattern" --path dir --type cs [-i] [-C 3] [--max N]
GLOB: wkappbot file glob "**/*.cs" --path dir — ALWAYS use **/ prefix
UNDO: wkappbot file undo <path> — restore from .bak/
WRITE: wkappbot file write <path> --content "..." (.bak/ created on overwrite)
⚠ CP949 files: Korean source with Han comments — verify encoding before edit
⚠ After edit: U+FFFD detected → auto Slack alert fired
author: claude
